{{Quote|Hey! Are you the courier I'm waiting on?|Fekk Trunkel|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Fekk Trunkel''' was a thug who worked for [[Borvo]] the Hutt on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] Trunkel delivered a business offer from Borvo to a courier of [[Kritus Morven]] near [[Keren/Legends|Keren]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateThug.png|250px|thumb|Every possible depictions of Fekk Trunkel.]]
Fekk Trunkel is a non-player character (NPC) in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' that is spawned somewhere outside of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]] when the player accepts Kritus Morven's first mission. As in many of the game's old quests, the NPC's gender, species and appearance is dynamically generated from a wide variety of possible appearances every time it is spawned.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}}
